nodes.label: Note-On Trigger
nodes.description: Voice start event triggers random value generation (MIDI event data is not read)

nodes.label: Random Generator
nodes.description: Generates a uniform random float in [0, 1) using JUCE Random (LCG seeded with system time)

nodes.label: Table Lookup
nodes.description: Maps the random value through a 512-point user-defined curve table (0-1 in, 0-1 out)

nodes.label: UseTable
nodes.description: Enables the lookup table for custom probability distribution shaping

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Final modulation value (0-1) sent to the parent modulation chain
